description_long: This is a modern athletic running shoe in a muted gray colorway, featuring a mesh upper for breathability and lightweight performance. The shoe has a distinctive segmented sole with hollow pods, likely designed for enhanced cushioning and flexibility. Subtle branding is visible on the side and toe, with a small logo and text details. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with flat laces, and the heel area is reinforced for added support. The interior appears padded for comfort, and the overall construction suggests a focus on both style and function. The shoe is clean and shows no visible signs of wear, indicating it is in new or like-new condition.
description: A sleek gray athletic running shoe with a mesh upper, segmented cushioned sole, and subtle branding. The design emphasizes comfort, breathability, and modern style.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the reinforced heel, padded collar, and the unique segmented sole structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mesh upper, side branding, and the full length of the hollow pod sole.
description_view_2: Front angle displaying the toe box, lacing system, and subtle logo on the toe.
description_view_3: Side-front view emphasizing the mesh texture, lacing, and the overall streamlined silhouette.
attribute_logo: Small white 'On' logo on the side and toe area
